question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the main sections of the thesis. There is no mention of chapters or structural components such as Introduction, Literature Review, Methodology, Implementation, Results, Conclusion, etc.

question: Description
feedback: The text does not provide a brief description of the contents of each section. While it outlines the problem and scope, it lacks any indication of what each chapter will cover.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis cannot be easily understood from this text. Although the problem and objectives are introduced, there is no clear indication of how the thesis is organized into sections or how the content progresses.
